title: Add error messages before returning NULL when encoding
author: radarhere
body:
While I'm here, I've also removed
https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/blob/9a89944e735283ce4bbdf2dde1ea7c44798d9683/src/encode.c#L1346-L1347
since "jpt" is never used.
https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/blob/9a89944e735283ce4bbdf2dde1ea7c44798d9683/src/PIL/Jpeg2KImagePlugin.py#L382-L385
